Title: Karakeep SDK has SSRF via metascraper-logo-favicon that bypasses validateUrl protections
Description: The `metascraper-logo-favicon` plugin makes HTTP requests to URLs extracted from attacker-controlled HTML without going through the application's `validateUrl()` SSRF protections. This allows any authenticated user to make the server fetch arbitrary internal URLs by bookmarking a page containing a crafted `<link rel="icon">` tag.
